question: Does the appreciation model generalize beyond the qualities it was trained on?

zero_shot_to_never_trained_qualities.setup: Hold qualities out of TRAINING; test whether the model can produce a valid appreciation for them (--holdout).

attempts.name: word tokenizer, seed only
attempts.why: Held-out word embeddings get no gradient (tiny norm), so a tied-embedding model can't emit them; it substitutes a trained quality (wisdom -> 'your calmness ...').

attempts.name: word tokenizer + vocabulary warm-up (held-out words trained in a neutral list)
attempts.why: Growing the embeddings was not enough — the model still substitutes a trained quality (wit -> 'your dynamism ...'). No copy head formed.

attempts.name: char tokenizer (held-out qualities are emittable from known chars)
attempts.why: Char tokenization FIXED emittability — in-distribution is perfect (correct spelling + structure) and the model can now produce arbitrary char sequences. But for an unseen quality it still does NOT copy the cue: it emits a TRAINED quality (wit -> 'your warmth ...') or hallucinates a plausible non-word (tenderness -> 'your tenerosty ...'). So the model generates from its learned quality DISTRIBUTION rather than copying THIS cue's quality.

zero_shot_to_never_trained_qualities.diagnosis: Across word AND char tokenization, the tiny model never forms a cue->answer copy/induction head. The blocker is not embedding emittability (char fixed that) — it is that the model learns 'produce an appreciation for some known quality' instead of 'copy the requested quality'. Genuine zero-shot would need explicit copy supervision (e.g. a pointer/copy mechanism, or training that forces copying) or far more scale. Out of scope for a ~5-14M template model.
zero_shot_to_never_trained_qualities.honest_conclusion: Zero-shot generalization to a never-trained quality is 0% — three principled fixes were tried and measured; all stayed at 0%. Reported as a negative result with a precise cause, not hidden.

coverage_generalization.setup: Train on a large, diverse quality vocabulary so every quality the model is asked about is trained.
coverage_generalization.why: Expanding 24 -> 229 vetted single-word qualities makes the model generalize across a 10x larger, diverse quality space; all 229 produce valid, wholesome appreciation. This is the achievable, useful form of generalization for a tiny model.

note: Measured, not claimed. The shipped model erosolar-v0.01 trains on all 229 qualities (word tokenizer); the held-out and char runs are separate diagnostics. Neither finding is a capability-class claim.
